title: Share exchange
doc_html:
§116.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1990, No. 849, §1, eff. for taxable years after Dec.  31, 1989; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
